subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad, O servant of the glorious threshold! Though in the eyes of men thou art deemed lowly, and in the sight of the chieftains of the people but a man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد ای بنده درگاه کبریاء اگر در انظار ناس شخص صغیری و نزد صنادید قوم مرد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @high station of the true believer, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
